Heartstrings Studio · Lumberport, WV

Written In Runes

For Darren- the journey continues...

The song

The story behind it

From a small town in WV to the deserts in Iraq...

Lyrics

[Verse 1]
Grew up with nothing on the wrong side of town
Odd kid, no map, just trying not to drown
Stepdad's fists and my brother's scared eyes
I was seventeen when I said my goodbyes
Grandpa's place on Saltwell Road, last few months of grace Packed
what little I had and I left that place
Looked back once at Josh standing there alone
Eight years younger, couldn't take him, had to go

[Pre-Chorus]
And a cop on the corner said I'd never be
More than a ghost on these steps of 7-Eleven
I heard him
And I left anyway

[Chorus]
It's written in runes on the back of my skin
Strength, honor, integrity — where I've always been
Every scar has a story only I can read
This is the life I built from the wreckage of me
Written in runes

[Verse 2]
Hawaii to Kuwait, Razor's Edge cassette
Gary hollered out — D, you see that yet
Thunderstruck in the desert, bombs lighting the sky
That's when I knew this wasn't TV, this was real life
Came home to a house that had already moved on
Just glad to breathe American air before too long
No parade, no closure, no one tells you how
To carry what you saw and still keep moving now

[Pre-Chorus]
The aftermath is always worse than being there
They just send you home and leave you standing in the air

[Chorus
It's written in runes on the back of my skin
Strength, honor, integrity — where I've always been
Every scar has a story only I can read
This is the life I built from the wreckage of me
Written in runes

[Bridge]
“If I can't be who I've always been… who am I gonna be now?”
I went back to find out
Saw that blurry desert sun go down
Not sharp, not clean — just haze and sand and red
Twenty years of living in my head
Came back home in '93
Same faces, same steps, same 7-Eleven
Tommy, you were wrong about me

[Verse 3]
Got a farm now, got my boys watching close
Didn't know someone was watching, learning how to stand Sometimes
the life you live is the helping hand
My youngest found her way back from the edge
I told her don't come home until you're strong enough to stand That's
not cold — that's the only love I had to give
The same love that taught me how to live

[Final Chorus]
It's written in runes on the back of my skin
Strength, honor, integrity — where I've always been
Every scar has a story only I can read
This is the life I built from the wreckage of me

Carved it in runes
Written in runes

Have someone worth a song?

Every song is written by hand — for one person, and the people who love them.

Start a song

Heartstrings Studio · Lumberport, West Virginia
